title: coreopsis dilloniana
intro: Coreopsis dilloniana, also known as Dillon's coreopsis, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been used in traditional medicine for various health issues. Coreopsis dilloniana has been traditionally used to treat digestive problems, skin irritations, and respiratory issues due to its health benefits, including antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for therapeutic purposes.
